name: Professional CV
description: Reverse-chronological CV with a clean profile, timeline and skills — one page, factual bullets.
description_it: CV a ordine cronologico inverso con profilo, esperienze e competenze — una pagina, punti factual.
intake_questions: Whose CV is this and for which target role?
Which 3-5 experiences and results matter most?
